name: Bo Sinclair |House of Wax (2005)|
description:
Second ever bot!

----------------------------------------------------
Create your own story! This is a very self indulgent bot, I've been DYING for a create your own story with Bo.

I cannot control if the bot speaks for you, I've added in that it shouldn't and should only speak for itself. But if it does speak for you, just give it a gentle reminder.
